Stop.command: repo_root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd) && log_dir="$repo_root/.github/logs" && log_file="$log_dir/ai-chat-log.jsonl" && mkdir -p "$log_dir" && payload=$(cat) && ts=$(date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z') && printf '{"timestamp":"%s","phase":"after","hook":"Stop","payload":%s}\n' "$ts" "$payload" >> "$log_file"

SessionStart.command: repo_root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd) && log_dir="$repo_root/.github/logs" && log_file="$log_dir/ai-chat-log.jsonl" && mkdir -p "$log_dir" && payload=$(cat) && ts=$(date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z') && printf '{"timestamp":"%s","phase":"session","hook":"SessionStart","payload":%s}\n' "$ts" "$payload" >> "$log_file"
